name: toolstem/toolstem-mcp-server
description: Agent-ready financial intelligence MCP tools — curated, not raw. Three tools that combine multiple data sources, derive human-readable signals (UNDERVALUED, STRONG, ACCELERATING), and pre-compute the math agents would otherwise have to do themselves.

tools.name: get_stock_snapshot
tools.description: Real-time price, valuation, DCF analysis, and analyst ratings with derived signals (UNDERVALUED / FAIRLY_VALUED / OVERVALUED) for a single ticker.

tools.name: get_company_metrics
tools.description: Profitability, financial health, cash flow, and 3-year CAGRs with derived signals (margin_trend, health_signal, growth_signal).

tools.name: compare_companies
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2–5 companies with automatic rankings (lowest_pe, highest_margin, strongest_balance_sheet, best_growth, most_undervalued, highest_rated).
